text: Christopher Nolan directed Inception. Leonardo DiCaprio stars in Inception as the lead actor.
Christopher Nolan directed Interstellar. Matthew McConaughey stars in Interstellar.
Leonardo DiCaprio won the Academy Award for Best Actor after starring in many films.
Christopher Nolan is a film director known for complex movies about time and memory.
Inception is a science fiction film about dreams and layered realities.
Matthew McConaughey appeared in a Nolan-directed science fiction film.
